name: Hidden Village of Ninjitsu Arts
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>隠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>れ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>里</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ざと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぽう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>修</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>練</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a "Ninja" monster is Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 "Ninja" monster or 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card in your GY; add it to your hand, but for the rest of this turn, you cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with the same name as the added card. If a "Ninja" monster(s) or "Ninjitsu Art" card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, you can banish 1 "Ninja" monster from your GY instead. You can only use each effect of "Hidden Village of Ninjitsu Arts" once per turn.
eff: If a "Ninja" monster is Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 "Ninja" monster or 1 "Ninjitsu Art" card in your GY; add it to your hand, but for the rest of this turn, you cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with the same name as the added card. If a "Ninja" monster(s) or "Ninjitsu Art" card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, you can banish 1 "Ninja" monster from your GY instead. You can only use each effect of "Hidden Village of Ninjitsu Arts" once per turn.

mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your Trap Cards
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
